title: Romantic Revolution Hi-CARA!
overview:
Once upon a time, there was a hero who protected the Earth from a great crisis... And now, in the face of another crisis, a new hero is born from Binan High School's "Earth Defense Club"! ...Huh? Who were those former heroes? Well, it was "those guys", "those guys". ...Huh? Why are you blurring out the names? It's a multi-verse setting, so mumble mumble... (vague)　

Anyway, the new defense department - Unzen Shinkuro, Sukayu Narushi, Unohana Sousuke, Oshamanbe Ushio and Aso Akuta.

title: Algae Is HI-CARA!
overview: With the help of the feline science of the mysterious future cat Nuru, the five members of the Defense Club have become the "Hi-CARA Romantic Squad" and successfully defeated the monsters plotting to take over the Earth. Then, before them appears the "Ban-CARA Avant Guard Corps", an Earth Conquest Club led by the mysterious prairie dog Master Kyan. Their true identities are none other than Doumeki Straight, Nyutou Samon and Nekoma Tasuku, roommates at the Kurotama Dorm and members of the Binan High School Student Council. With lies and enemies under the same roof, it's impossible for something not to happen... right?

title: The Twit-Tree Is Hi-CARA!
overview: Once a month, Binan High School's Handsome Boys Contest is held as a regular event. Since entering the school, Sukayu Narushi has been winning the contest in a row, and is a beauty guru recognized by both himself and others.

title: Being a Mom Is Also Hi-CARA!
overview: For the dorm students who live away from their parents, the absence of their dorm breadwinner is a real crisis for their lives.

title: Being Hi-CARA at the Swimming Contest!
Be Hi-CARA at the Ninja Village!
overview: Summer vacation has begun at Binan High School, and Aso Sorata returns home with the gluttonous Oshamanbe, whom he caught with mountain delicacies. Waiting for them in their hometown are Aso's three younger brothers.

title: Being Hi-CARA on the Crab Cannery Ship!
It's Hi-CARA Even If Your Stomach Hurts!
It's Hi-CARA Even If You're Alone!
